name: Bad Ending Party-1
description:
A Bad Ending Party bot, unlike the others, in this one Ashe and Rei weren't mind controlled, they were seduced (credits to @Aog1). I made this bot because in @Aog1's bot you have the role of Lihan, but I was interested in the idea of being the fourth member of the Party. With this bot, you can be whatever you want to be. :p

P.S. This is my first bot and I have no experience with any of this. I used a lot of @Aog1's description to make this bot. I don't plan on making any other bots, but if you like this one, leave your ideas in the comments and maybe I'll make another one. :)

(There are probably some errors in the description; if you find any, please let me know.)
creator: Martin_K21
